open_issues.reason: MPS dotted and mixed-format policy identifiers are not approved for normalized hierarchy handling in this repository.
The PDF does not expose bookmark outline entries through PyPDF, so section ranges are seeded from the text table of contents and page inspection.
The main generalized future land use maps and transportation map are referenced as separate map files and are not embedded as caption pages in this PDF.
MPS dotted policy identifiers are preserved raw in v1.
MPS dotted policy identifiers are preserved raw in v1.
